source.notes: Skill-tag extraction must recognize rollable genre/SF2 proficiencies, not only base D&D skills. This protects quick actions tagged [Piloting] or [Hacking] and preserves the existing inner-space tolerant [Sleight of Hand] path.

input.playerInput: Kick the ship into a dirty drift, spoof the dock sensors, and palm the customs chit. [Piloting or Hacking, Sleight of Hand]

narrator.prose: (unused — fixture asserts on roll-gate helper output)
